User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user within the application, storing core profile information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user entity.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

photoURL.description: URL of the user's profile photo.

creationTime.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

lastSignInTime.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the user signed in.

isAdmin.description: Indicates if the user has administrative privileges.

minutesBalance.description: The user's current balance of available minutes.

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores additional profile information for a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user profile entity.

bio.description: A short biography or description of the user.

website.description: URL of the user's personal website.

Plan.title: Plan
Plan.description: Represents a subscription plan offered in the application.

title.description: The title of the plan (e.g., 'Plan Essentiel').

price.description: The monthly price of the plan (e.g., '€49').

minutes.description: Number of minutes included in the plan.

sessions.description: An estimate of the number of sessions per month.

features.description: A list of features for display purposes.

benefits.description: The actual logic-driven benefits of the plan.

includedServices.description: List of service IDs included. 'all' means all services.

popular.description: Whether this plan is marked as popular.

order.description: A number to control the display order of the plans.

Appointment.title: Appointment
Appointment.description: Represents a user's appointment for a service.

userId.description: The ID of the user who booked the appointment.

userName.description: Denormalized name of the user for quick display.

userEmail.description: Denormalized email of the user for quick display.

serviceName.description: The name of the service booked (e.g., 'Hydromassage').

date.description: The date and time of the appointment.

duration.description: The duration of the appointment in minutes.

status.description: The current status of the appointment.

paymentMethod.description: The payment method used for the appointment.

Service.title: Service
Service.description: Represents a service offered by the business.

description.description: A brief description of the service.

pricingTiers.description: A list of pricing tiers, each with a duration and a corresponding price.

duration.description: The duration of the service in minutes.

price.description: The price for the given duration.

order.description: A number to control the display order of the services.

color.description: A hex color code to represent the service in the UI (e.g., '#3b82f6').

isUnderMaintenance.description: Indicates if the service is currently under maintenance and unavailable for booking.

id.description: Unique identifier for the schedule day (e.g., 'monday').

timeSlots.description: A list of available time slots for the day (e.g., ['09:00', '09:30']).

order.description: The order of the day in the week (1 for Monday).

TimeSlotLock.title: Time Slot Lock
TimeSlotLock.description: Represents a temporary lock on a time slot during the booking process.

serviceId.description: The ID of the service being booked.

date.description: The date of the locked time slot (e.g., '2024-07-31').

time.description: The time of the locked slot (e.g., '14:30').

lockedByUserId.description: The ID of the user who holds the lock.

expiresAt.description: The timestamp when the lock automatically expires.

Invoice.title: Invoice
Invoice.description: Represents a billing invoice for a user's subscription.

userId.description: The ID of the user this invoice belongs to.

planId.description: The ID of the subscribed plan.

planTitle.description: The title of the plan at the time of invoicing.

date.description: The date the invoice was issued.

amount.description: The total amount of the invoice.

status.description: The current status of the invoice.

pdfUrl.description: Optional URL to download the invoice PDF.

GuestPass.title: Guest Pass
GuestPass.description: Represents a guest pass used by a subscriber to invite a guest.

id.description: Unique identifier for the guest pass.

host_user_id.description: The ID of the user who owns the subscription and issued the pass.

guest_user_id.description: The ID of the guest user who redeemed the pass.

appointment_id.description: The ID of the appointment for which the pass was used.

created_at.description: Timestamp indicating when the pass was used.

definition.description: Stores user account information. Path-based ownership simplifies security rules, ensuring only the user can access their data.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Stores additional profile information for a user. Path-based ownership ensures data privacy.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: profileId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user profile.

definition.description: Stores subscription plans. This data is public and can be read by anyone, but only managed by admins.

params.name: planId
params.description: The unique identifier of the plan.

definition.description: Stores user appointments in a top-level collection. Publicly readable for availability checks, but writable only by the owner.

params.name: appointmentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the appointment.

definition.description: Stores available services. This data is public and can be read by anyone, but only managed by admins.

params.name: serviceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the service.

definition.description: Stores the weekly business schedule. This data is public and can be read by anyone for booking purposes, but only managed by admins.

params.name: dayId
params.description: The unique identifier for the day of the week (e.g., 'monday').

definition.description: Stores temporary locks on time slots. This data is public readable for real-time availability checks, but writable only by the user holding the lock.

params.name: lockId
params.description: The unique identifier of the time slot lock.

definition.description: Stores user invoices. Readable only by the user who owns the invoice or by an admin.

params.name: invoiceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the invoice.

definition.description: Logs the usage of guest passes by subscribers. Readable by the host and guest.

params.name: passId
params.description: The unique identifier of the guest pass record.

firestore.reasoning:
Based on the provided entities and the application's core features, a simple and secure Firestore structure is recommended, focusing on user-centric data organization. This design prioritizes Authorization Independence, QAPs, and structural segregation to ensure robust security rules and efficient data access.

1.  **User Data:** User profiles and related data are stored under `/users/{userId}`. This path-based ownership simplifies security rules, making it straightforward to control access based on the user's ID. The UserProfile entity is placed as a subcollection of `/users/{userId}/profiles/{profileId}`. This approach ensures that only the user can access their profile data, enforcing a private data model.

*   **Authorization Independence:** The design avoids `get()` calls in security rules by directly associating user data with the user's ID in the path.
*   **QAPs (Rules are not Filters):** Because data is segregated by user ID, list operations are inherently secure. Listing profiles under a user ID can be done securely without filtering.
*   **Structural Segregation:** All documents under `/users/{userId}` share the same security posture, simplifying the rules and making them more maintainable.
